quotes.quote: The drug candidates are ranked by an LLM-judged tournament according to the strength of the scientific rationale, pharmacological profile, and methodology of the supporting literature.
quotes.rationale: Identifies the LLM tournament as a ranking evaluator over proposed drug candidates using supporting literature.

quotes.quote: When comparing the LLM judge’s preferences with experts’, the LLM judge demonstrated high concordance with expert preferences, with an average of 7.25 of its top 10 hypotheses matching those in the experts’ top 10 (Supplementary Figure S11A). This concordance is more than double that expected from random selection. Furthermore, the LLM judge exhibited higher intra-rater consistency than human experts (Supplementary Figure S11B). When presented with identical pairwise comparisons, the LLM judge selected the same hypothesis in 88% of comparisons, as compared with human experts who selected the same hypothesis 61% of the time.
quotes.rationale: Reports an agreement and consistency study for the LLM judge against expert preferences.

quotes.quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis. Robin then interprets the results of this analysis to generate a new round of therapeutic candidates.
quotes.rationale: Shows experimental data analysis and interpretation feeding a new candidate-generation round.

quotes.quote: Read demultiplexing and alignment was performed by a human and subsequent differential gene expression analysis was performed by Finch.
quotes.rationale: Identifies a computational analysis component used for differential gene expression after human preprocessing.

quotes.quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis.
quotes.rationale: Shows human researchers executing experiments and routing resulting data back to the system.

quotes.quote: Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.
quotes.rationale: Identifies human analysis of flow cytometry data as a separate assessment path.

diagnostics.consequence: The system cannot be coded as fully autonomous for laboratory execution or executable protocol generation.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: For example, while Robin generates experimental outlines, it does not yet produce precise, executable protocols—future iterations aim to provide detailed methodologies that require minimal human translation for laboratory execution.

diagnostics.statement: The packet reports that generated experimental outlines are not precise executable protocols.

diagnostics.consequence: Reliability can be credited for the candidate-ranking judge, but not transferred to experimental-result analysis or human flow-cytometry analysis channels.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: When comparing the LLM judge’s preferences with experts’, the LLM judge demonstrated high concordance with expert preferences, with an average of 7.25 of its top 10 hypotheses matching those in the experts’ top 10 (Supplementary Figure S11A). This concordance is more than double that expected from random selection. Furthermore, the LLM judge exhibited higher intra-rater consistency than human experts (Supplementary Figure S11B). When presented with identical pairwise comparisons, the LLM judge selected the same hypothesis in 88% of comparisons, as compared with human experts who selected the same hypothesis 61% of the time.

diagnostics.statement: The reported reliability evidence is an agreement study for the LLM judge's preferences, not calibration or validation of every validator channel.

diagnostics.consequence: Closure depends on human experimental execution and human or mixed analysis steps, limiting a claim of closed computational feedback across the full discovery loop.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis. Robin then interprets the results of this analysis to generate a new round of therapeutic candidates.
Read demultiplexing and alignment was performed by a human and subsequent differential gene expression analysis was performed by Finch.
Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.

diagnostics.statement: The packet reports human involvement in experiment execution, read preprocessing, and flow-cytometry analysis within the evaluation loop.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: For example, while Robin generates experimental outlines, it does not yet produce precise, executable protocols—future iterations aim to provide detailed methodologies that require minimal human translation for laboratory execution.

recommendations.proposed_action: Report protocol generation as experimental outlines unless executable protocol detail is demonstrated.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: All coded claims distinguish outlines from precise executable protocols.
success_check.evidence_needed: Packet text or artifact evidence showing whether generated methods are executable without human translation.
success_check.observable: Protocol-executability claim in the coded record.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: When comparing the LLM judge’s preferences with experts’, the LLM judge demonstrated high concordance with expert preferences, with an average of 7.25 of its top 10 hypotheses matching those in the experts’ top 10 (Supplementary Figure S11A). This concordance is more than double that expected from random selection. Furthermore, the LLM judge exhibited higher intra-rater consistency than human experts (Supplementary Figure S11B). When presented with identical pairwise comparisons, the LLM judge selected the same hypothesis in 88% of comparisons, as compared with human experts who selected the same hypothesis 61% of the time.

recommendations.proposed_action: Restrict reliability credit to the LLM candidate-ranking channel and label it as agreement evidence.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: No non-ranking channel receives reliability evidence from the LLM preference study.
success_check.evidence_needed: Channel-by-channel mapping of reliability evidence to evaluator and target property.
success_check.observable: Reliability evidence assignments in the coded channels.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Researchers next conduct the experiments and provide the resulting data to Robin for autonomous analysis. Robin then interprets the results of this analysis to generate a new round of therapeutic candidates.
Read demultiplexing and alignment was performed by a human and subsequent differential gene expression analysis was performed by Finch.
Flow cytometry data was also analyzed by a human scientist.

recommendations.proposed_action: Keep human laboratory execution and human flow-cytometry analysis as separate non-computational authority in the coding.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Human execution and human analysis are not merged into autonomous Robin validation.
success_check.evidence_needed: Explicit channel separation for experiment execution, computational analysis, and human analysis.

memory_structure: experimental results provided to Robin for autonomous analysis
analysis interpretation used to generate a new round of therapeutic candidates
policy_type: LLM-judged tournament ranking of drug candidates
experimental-result interpretation loop for candidate revision
